audit_items.proof_trace: Emitter::add_close_mapping() is a one-liner delegating to SourceMap::add_close_mapping(), which constructs a Mapping struct (two POD Position fields) and pushes it into a std::vector<Mapping>. No explicit heap allocations (no new/malloc) are performed anywhere in the call chain; the vector's internal storage is RAII-managed and automatically freed. The property premise is false — there are no unmanaged allocations to track.
